SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Class JkComputedDependency

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.JkComputedDependency
All Implemented Interfaces:
JkDependency, JkFileDependency
Direct Known Subclasses:
JkLocalProjectDependency
public class JkComputedDependency extends Object implements JkFileDependency
Dependency on computed resource. More concretely, this is a JkFileDependencyon files that might not be present at the time of the build and that has to be generated. Instances of this class are responsible to generate the missing files.

Computed dependencies are instantiated by providing expected files and a Runnable that generates these files in case one of them is missing.

This is yet simple but quite powerful mechanism, cause the runnable can be anything as a Maven or an ANT build of another project, a Jeka build of another project, ...

This is the way to create multi-projects (and multi-techno) builds.
